rationale: Add a procedural policy file to prefer file-based LLM IO and cap CLI arg usage, reducing Windows command-line length risk without touching code.

edits.content:
{
  "schema": "brainflow.llm_io_policy.v1",
  "prefer_file_io": true,
  "use_temp_payloads": true,
  "max_arg_bytes": 2000,
  "notes": "Reduce Windows CLI arg length risk by favoring file-based payloads."
}

risks: If code does not read this policy yet, this change has no immediate effect.
expected_benefit: Provides a single-source policy to guide safer LLM invocation with shorter CLI arguments.
